zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Cloyes於1652年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，她的父親John Cloyes48歲，母親Abigail Mournings44歲。她於1671年與Isaac Hallom在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1730年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克費利浦德瑟特 本 曼恩享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Cloyes于1652年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，她的父亲John Cloyes48岁，母亲Abigail Mournings44岁。她于1671年与Isaac Hallom在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1730年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克費利浦德瑟特 本 曼恩享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cloyes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English clouse, cluse, Old English clūse ‘bar, enclosure, narrow pass’, later ‘mill dam, sluicegate, or floodgate’. In the latter sense it may have been a metonymic occupational name applied to a miller. See also Clowser .
English: variant of Close or Clow , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Clow
meanings: English (East Midlands and East Anglia): probably from Middle English cloue, a false singular form of Middle English clouse ‘bar, enclosure, narrow pass’, later ‘mill dam, sluice-gate, floodgate’. See Clowes .
English and Scottish (southern and central Scotland): variant of   Clough   1.
English (Devon): from an earlier form of modern Cornish cleath ‘dyke, earthwork’, as found in the placename Clovelly (Devon) and most likely a habitational name referring to that place.

variants.name: Clews
meanings: English (West Midlands and Cheshire): variant of Clowes or Clew, itself a variant of Clough or Clow .

variants.name: Clowser
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a clowse, Middle English clouse, cluse, Old English clūse ‘bar, enclosure, narrow pass’, later ‘mill dam, sluice-gate, floodgate’. Clowser is a type of formation (topographic term + -er) that is especially characteristic of Sussex and the adjacent counties. It was synonymous with atte Clouse, and the Clowser family is probably descended from Thomas atte Cluse, recorded in 1332 in Warnham, Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1700: Massachusetts, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Cloyes was born in 1652, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Cloyes, was 48 and her mother, Abigail Mournings, was 44. She married Isaac Hallom in 1671, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1730, in Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Cloyes est née en 1652, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Cloyes, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Abigail Mournings, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Isaac Hallom en 1671, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1730, à Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Cloyes 1652 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cloyes 48 und ihre Mutter Abigail Mournings 44. Sie hat 1671 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Isaac Hallom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1730 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Cloyes è nata il nel 1652 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Cloyes, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Abigail Mournings, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Isaac Hallom nel 1671, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1730, nel Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Cloyesが1652年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父John Cloyesは48歳，母Abigail Mourningsは44歳であった。1671年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでIsaac Hallomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1730年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークフレエプオルトデセルト オフ メインで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Cloyes(이)가 1652년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cloyes(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Mournings(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1671년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Isaac Hallom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1730년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 프리포트 데세르트 프 맹에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Cloyes nasceu em 1652, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Cloyes, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Mournings, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Isaac Hallom em 1671, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1730, em Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Cloyes родилась в 1652 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Cloyes было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Mournings, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Isaac Hallom в 1671 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1730 г. в местности десирт оф меин, фрипорт, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Cloyes nació en 1652, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Cloyes, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Abigail Mournings, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Isaac Hallom en 1671, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1730, en Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 79 años.
